what_went_well: PHPStan level 8 passes with zero errors (needed --memory-limit=512M fix in Makefile)
PHP CS Fixer: zero violations, no files changed
All 28 unit + functional tests pass (17 unit, 11 functional)
All 17 agent convention compliance tests pass
DevReporterPage.js page object created and registered in codecept.conf.js

what_went_wrong: E2E test 'admin panel reports list shows table with columns' initially failed because CSS text-transform:uppercase causes Playwright to see 'DATE' not 'Date' — fixed by updating assertions to uppercase
improvement_suggestions: Consider increasing PHP memory_limit in the container's php.ini to avoid needing --memory-limit CLI flag for PHPStan
The dev-reporter-agent compose file now exposes port 18087 on the main service (not just e2e) — this is needed for conventions-test but may conflict with the e2e service if both run simultaneously
